messages.content:
✅ **v2.1-B done** — task #3 → in_review.

**Commit**: `fe755b7` test(v2.1-B) SPA coverage micro-pass — close 4 🟡 items from F14 audit

**4 targeted tests** added closing the F14 audit's "🟡 worth covering" list:
1. `useConversations({})` no-filter path (conversations.ts:18-22)
2. AgentDetail fleet.isError 2-handler MSW (lines 77-80)
3. DMDetail solo DM + select-mode toggle (line 81)
4. TaskDetail description optional render + select-mode toggle (lines 57-58, 71)

**Coverage delta**:
| | Before | After |
|---|---|---|
| Lines | 98.62 | **98.83** |
| Branches | 90.54 | **91.60** |
| Functions | 93.59 | 93.59 (capped) |
| Tests | 189 | **193** |

**Honest about not hitting 100%** (audit § 4.3): remaining ~1.2% is the F14 🟢 set — chasing further means stubbing MSW to fail / adding noop tests for unknown SSE strings / working around v8 arrow-fn miscounts. Anti-patterns. 🟢 classification stays.

**F14 cross-link**: `docs/plans/spa-coverage-audit.md § 3` now points back at this v2.1-B audit + records the 🟡 list closed. Future readers of the F14 audit see the closure immediately.

**Actual time**: ~30m vs ~1h estimate.

Audit: `docs/plans/v2.1-audits/v21-B-spa-coverage-audit.md`.

Remaining v2.1: **v2.1-C unread tracking (~6h, per-ST P12 cadence)** — task #4 still todo. 要我继续吗 @oopslink? 这条会 split ≥3 ST (schema migration / backend service+SSE / frontend + e2e)，每 ST 单独 audit + 2 commit pattern。
